backend/main.mo: Defines backend actor with user profiles, licenses, strategies, trades, and authorization logic, including CRUD-style query and update methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking a UI text-removal feature to affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Mapping of frontend file paths to short summaries describing each component or utility’s purpose.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS theme definitions with light/dark variables and Cupertino-style design tokens.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML file loading the SPA root and main TypeScript entrypoint.
frontend/index.ts: Defines the SignalFetchResult TypeScript type used for HTTP outcall responses.
frontend/PHASE1_BACKEND_IMPLEMENTATION_C: Detailed backend implementation checklist covering documentation, type system, data storage, APIs, and security steps.
frontend/ROADMAP_BATCH_EXECUTION.md: Roadmap document outlining phases, constraints, and step-by-step tasks for implementing features across phases 3–8.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component handling authentication flow, loading states, landing screen, and profile setup gating.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button component managing Internet Identity authentication and clearing cached data on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal that collects a user's display name and optional account ID and saves the profile via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Displays an access denied alert indicating admin permissions are required.
frontend/src/components/common/ToastProv: Provides a toast context and renders dismissible timed toasts of different types.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AuditL: Fetches and displays recent audit log entries in a scrollable table with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Renders the main dashboard navigation header with screen switching, admin-gated links, and user info.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Equity: Loads and visualizes equity curve data using a Recharts area/line chart with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LiveLo: Displays a live terminal-like feed with periodic pings and a connectivity test that logs results.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LivePu: Duplicate terminal component showing periodic bot status pings and a connectivity test with logged output.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Perfor: Displays an equity curve chart with loading, error, and empty states using data from useGetEquityCurve.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Shows bot heartbeat status, license status, cycles info, and warnings based on heartbeat data.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Uplink: Provides a UI to view and toggle the bot's uplink status with animated indicators.
Manages screen routing via URL path and hash and renders the appropriate screen with header and footer.
frontend/src/components/settings/AdminTi: Lists subscription tiers in a table with status, limits, pricing, and feature details.
frontend/src/components/settings/Connect: Shows bot connection status and opens a wizard to configure the bot's keypair and endpoint.
Modal implementing a multi-step wizard to generate an Ed25519 keypair, display and copy the private key, link the public key, and set a bot URL.
frontend/src/components/settings/Profile: Form for viewing and updating the current user's profile, including display name, account ID, timezone, and notification settings.
frontend/src/components/settings/StripeC: Modal for entering and saving Stripe secret key and allowed countries, with validation and submission via mutation.
frontend/src/components/settings/Subscri: Panel that lists subscription tiers, configures Stripe if needed, and creates checkout sessions for paid tiers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and invalidates dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Admin-related hooks for checking admin status and managing licenses through backend actor mutations and queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditLedger.ts: Hook that fetches and periodically refreshes the audit log from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Hooks to fetch and update the caller's user profile with query invalidation on save.
frontend/src/hooks/useEquityCurve.ts: Hook that builds an equity curve from the user's recent trades by calculating running PnL over time.
frontend/src/hooks/useFetchSignalsTest.t: Provides a mutation hook that calls actor.fetchSignals, handles union errors, and shows success or failure toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartbeat.ts: Fetches heartbeat data for an account on a 10‑second interval using react-query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity auth context, managing login, logout, stored identities, and AuthClient configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useLicense.ts: Retrieves the current user's license status via actor.getMyLicenseStatus.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkBotPublicKey.t: Mutation hook to register a bot public key and refresh related queries with toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveLogs.ts: Fetches live trade logs for the current user every 5 seconds using actor.getTradesPaginated.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetBotUrl.ts: Mutation hook to set a bot URL with client‑side validation, handling actor errors and success toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripe.ts: Provides hooks for Stripe config checks, updates, checkout session creation, and session status retrieval.
frontend/src/hooks/useTiers.ts: Loads subscription tiers and individual tier data via actor APIs with simple result handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrades.ts: Fetches paginated trades for an account with customizable time and range parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useUplink.ts: Retrieves bot profile info and toggles uplink state with toast notifications and query invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and custom color variables for a dark Cupertino‑style theme with glassmorphism.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility function combining clsx and tailwind‑merge for className merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Root entry that sets up React Query and Internet Identity provider before rendering the app.
frontend/src/screens/AdminScreen.tsx: Admin interface for viewing, creating, updating, and revoking licenses with various UI components.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Dashboard layout rendering uplink controls, live terminal, performance metrics, and audit logs.
frontend/src/screens/OverviewScreen.tsx: Displays the user's license status and account info, handling loading states and missing data cases.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentFailureScree: Shows a payment cancellation message with an option to return to the dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentSuccessScree: Shows a successful payment confirmation and allows returning to the dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Provides a tabbed settings interface for profile, bot connection, subscription, and admin tier management.
frontend/src/screens/TradesScreen.tsx: Fetches and displays paginated trade history with filters for account and date range.
frontend/src/utils/actorErrorMessage.ts: Normalizes actor error messages into user-friendly text with specific pattern handling.
frontend/src/utils/encoding.ts: Provides hex-to-bytes and bytes-to-hex conversion utilities.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Formats timestamps and calculates trade profit/loss values.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for managing URL and session-stored parameters with hash/query support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: TailwindCSS configuration defining theme extensions, colors, fonts, and plugins.
project_state.json: Describes the project’s current state, scope expansion, architectural constraints, and known issues surrounding backend routing, Stripe integration, access control, cycle balance handling, and Ed25519 key generation. Includes feature lists, constraints, and notes for ongoing refactor and deployment fixes.
